dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes: (1) uptrend condition proxied by close > sma_20; (2) tiny red candle = small body size relative to ATR and red close (close < prev_close); (3) red candle at top of previous green = positioned after higher previous close; (4) next candle takes out the high = current high > prev_high (breakout confirmation). Exit when trend breaks below 20-SMA. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given small candle volatility pattern.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes: (1) uptrend condition proxied by close > sma_20; (2) tiny red candle = small body size relative to ATR and red close (close < prev_close); (3) red candle at top of previous green = positioned after higher previous close; (4) next candle takes out the high = current high > prev_high (breakout confirmation). Exit when trend breaks below 20-SMA. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given small candle volatility pattern.

source_rule_text: Enter a long trend when a small red candle forms at or near the top of a previous green candle during an uptrend, and the next candle(s) take out the high of the small red candle.
